modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the surplus process for computer hardware.

full_description_text:  
The technician is seeking clarification on how to surplus hardware within the campus environment. They have questions regarding what items Information Technology Services will collect for surplus and whether it is possible to purchase their old surplussed equipment. This inquiry reflects a need for understanding the surplus procedures and policies in place.
